jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at FoodWorld
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!
